content:
Hi,keeper!May I get this list in text?
I think this would help us with GPT translation.

GPT Key words translation and Synonyms
Aliemus = Madness = Insanity 
Power = Strength
Vigilante = Alert
Exalt = Ultimate = Aliemus Blowup = Madness Blowup 
Strike = Attack : Normal attack card; Special command cards that are treated as strike; Accidental Fallacy relic.
Key Command = Posse = Silver Key
S-Energy = Silver Key Charge Level
Retaliate = Counter = Counterattack
Poison = Intoxication = Toxin
Pierce = Piercing = Pierce Damage = Puncture = Puncture Damage
True Damage = Fixed Damage
 Base Damage = Active Damage
Heal = Healing = Health Recovery = Recover
Gnosis Awakening = Rouse = Menophin Roused
Boost = Bonus
Vulnerable = Vulnerability
Summon Tentacle = Command Tentacle
Tentacle Damage = Tentacle Injury = Tentacle Attack
Devour = Consume
Transition = Transfer = Shift = Phase Shift = Jump = Leap = Warp
Ultra space = Ultra Dimensional Space = Hyperspace
Deplete = Exhaust = Destroyed
Ready = Prepare = Preparation
Void = Nothingness
Sacrifice (not the DOT) = Ritual = Rite : Miryam’s skill effects
Here you go, hope this help <:rose1:1234798154000633949>

Unique = Team Unique (wheel effects - only one effect of a wheel of the same name can apply at a time)
Trigger = Inflict (Gelot’s def: inflict, Nymp/Miryam/24: trigger).
